title: P20: three-part materiality test in exploring's Socratic locking
action: In skills/bee-exploring/SKILL.md step 4 (Socratic Locking), add a materiality-test bullet BEFORE the blindspot-pass bullet: every candidate question must pass three checks before being asked — material (the answer changes scope, architecture, UX, data model, or acceptance criteria), grounded (cites scout evidence or a concrete uncertainty, never generic preference), answerable (the user can choose an option, approve a default, or supply a reference). A question failing the test is not asked: it becomes a labeled assumption in CONTEXT.md or moves to planning. Add one matching Red Flags line (a question asked that fails the materiality test). Match the existing bullet voice and density (P9/P11 bullets are the register). Then sync the installed copy: cp skills/bee-exploring/SKILL.md ~/.claude/skills/bee-exploring/SKILL.md

truths: Exploring's step 4 states the material/grounded/answerable test and what happens to a failing question

artifacts.substantive: materiality-test bullet in step 4 + one Red Flags line; no other steps reworded

key_links: installed ~/.claude/skills/bee-exploring/SKILL.md identical to repo source after sync
prohibitions: No new skill, no new reference file, no renumbering of existing steps or flow items
Do not alter the P9/P11 bullets

verify: grep -q 'material' skills/bee-exploring/SKILL.md && grep -q 'answerable' skills/bee-exploring/SKILL.md && diff -q skills/bee-exploring/SKILL.md "$HOME/.claude/skills/bee-exploring/SKILL.md" && node skills/bee-hive/templates/tests/test_lib.mjs

trace.outcome: Materiality test (material/grounded/answerable) added to exploring step 4 before the P9 bullet + matching Red Flags line; installed copy synced. RED: grep -n answerable exit 1 pre-edit. GREEN: 2 marker hits, diff repo vs installed clean, test_lib 124/0, judge intact.
trace.verify_command: grep -c answerable skills/bee-exploring/SKILL.md && diff -q repo vs installed && test_lib
